name.description: Library name (used for folder, file, and class names).

directory.description: Optional subdirectory below libs/backend for the new library.

route.description: HTTP route path for the controller.

entityImportPath.description: Override the import path for the primary entity.

dtoName.description: DTO class used by the CRUD controller.

dtoImportPath.description: Import path for the DTO class.

createDtoName.description: Create DTO class wired to the main DTO.

createDtoImportPath.description: Import path for the create DTO class.

updateDtoName.description: Update DTO class used by the CRUD controller.

updateDtoImportPath.description: Import path for the update DTO class.

relatedEntity.description: Optional related entity to wire inside the service create/update overrides.

relatedEntityImportPath.description: Override the import path for the related entity.

relatedEntityField.description: Property name on the primary entity that references the related entity.

relatedEntityIdProperty.description: DTO property that carries the related entity identifier.

importAlias.description: Path alias that points to the generated library inside tsconfig.base.json.
